title: KabelDirekt – 8K / 4K HDMI Cable – 4m & More HDMI Cables (0.15m–22.5m) – German-Engineered HDMI Lead – Supports 10K/8K@60Hz/4K@120Hz – HDMI Cable for HDTV, PC, PS5, Xbox, Switch
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Maximum Performance: Designed to exceed existing HDMI specifications, this HDMI-to-HDMI cable supports UHD-2 resolutions, including 10K@60Hz, 8K@60Hz, and 4K@120Hz. It also supports HDR, 7.1 surround sound, ARC, and Ethernet

German-Engineered: Unlike conventional HDMI cables, KabelDirekt cables feature a German-engineered multi-layer shielding system inside the HDMI connector (see images). Gold-plated, break-resistant connectors and high-purity copper conductors ensure stable, interference-free signal transmission and exceptional durability
Length Options for Every Setup: Available in a range of lengths from 0.15m to 22.5m – ideal for home cinemas, gaming setups, offices, and professional AV installations

Buy with Confidence: Covered by a 36-month manufacturer’s warranty. Each cable undergoes stringent quality control and is individually machine-tested to ensure flawless performance and long-term reliability
Wide Compatibility: Perfect for PCs, laptops, gaming consoles (PS5, Xbox, Switch/Switch 2), Blu-ray/DVD players, TVs, streaming devices, monitors, projectors, and all HDMI-enabled devices
